subject: a ghostly smoky humanoid entity rising above open flames, arms outstretched with skeletal clawed hands, the upper body and face dissolving into dark smoke
description: A translucent, smoky figure rises between two stone archway columns above a low bed of orange-and-red flame. The entity's form is wispy and diffuse — the torso and lower body trail off into dark smoke while two pale skeletal hands extend outward, one reaching upward with splayed claw-like fingers. What might be long ribbons of hair or ethereal tendrils stream upward from the figure's dissolving head. The composition is framed by aged stone masonry with faint ember-orange torchlight visible in the wall sconces. The overall palette is deep charcoal and black with amber fire at the base and muted blue-violet tones in the smoke. The mood is ominous and haunting, a revenant caught between rest and resurgence.
foreground: orange and red flames at the base, pale skeletal hands reaching outward
background: stone archway columns, dark smoky atmosphere with faint ember sconces
emotion: menacing and yearning — arms outstretched as if grasping, face dissolving into void
